evals.name: find-replace-in-form
evals.prompt: I have an HWP file at ../rhwp/samples/aift.hwp. The document mentions '인공지능' / 'AI' in several places — please replace every occurrence of '주관기관' with '주관 기관' (with a space) and save the result to /tmp/aift-replaced.hwp. After saving, render page 0 to a PNG so I can check that the layout still looks right.
evals.expected_output: Output file /tmp/aift-replaced.hwp exists and is a valid HWP. A PNG of page 0 exists. The agent reports how many replacements were made and shows the PNG path.

evals.name: fill-template-form
evals.prompt: Open the form template at ../rhwp/samples/field-01-memo.hwp and list every form field by name. Then fill in any field whose name suggests it asks for: 회사명, 작성자, 부서명, and 전화번호. Use plausible Korean values you choose yourself. Save the filled document to /tmp/memo-filled.hwp and render page 0 as a PNG so I can confirm the values landed correctly.
evals.expected_output: An initial JSON listing of fields is shown. /tmp/memo-filled.hwp exists. PNG of page 0 visually shows the filled values. Agent reports which fields it filled and with what values.

evals.name: create-from-scratch
evals.prompt: Create a brand-new HWP document at /tmp/new-report.hwp containing: a title line that reads '2026년 1분기 보고서', one short paragraph of body text in Korean below it, and a 3-row by 4-column table below the paragraph. Save it as HWP 5.0 (.hwp). Then render page 0 to PNG so I can confirm the layout.
evals.expected_output: /tmp/new-report.hwp exists and is a valid HWP. The PNG shows a title, a paragraph, and a 3x4 table — three structurally distinct elements, in order.

evals.name: read-and-summarize
evals.prompt: I have an HWP file at ../rhwp/samples/aift.hwp. Please give me a 5-sentence summary of what it contains. Use the most accurate text-extraction approach available.
evals.expected_output: A 5-sentence summary that reflects the actual content of the document. Agent uses the markdown or text extraction path (CLI-backed), not just SVG/visual inspection.
